itemName.zh: Mystery Ranch Blackjack 50背包（组合迷彩）

description.zh:
很高兴再次见到你，我会再带你过一遍，我对此太兴奋了！这就像拿到了一张你等了多年的电影票，还有前排座位和一切！啊，美好的时光……但现在我们不能 afford to get distracted by nostalgia。

其他经销商收到了关于这些武器的通知——对我们来说好事是他们不知道它们可能在哪里！但他们想要它们，就好像他们的生命取决于它一样，我和Lotus已经讨论过这个场景了，选择权在你手里，我的哥们，你有责任。如果有人向你要武器，就拿给他们，除非是某个超级 shady motherfucker，否则这是为了更大的利益，否则这完全取决于你给谁。

你可能想等到他们中的一些人开始联系你。万一你弄丢了箱子，我会让人再把它藏到集装箱里。
description.en:
Glad to see you again, I'll walk you through this again, I'm so excited for this! It's like getting tickets to a movie you waited years to see, with front row seats and everything! Ahh, good times... But we can't afford to get distracted by nostalgia now.

Other dealers were notified about these weapons - Good thing for us is that they don't have a clue where they could be! But they want them as if their life depended on it, me and Lotus discussed this scenario already, the choice lies in your hands my man, you have the responsibility. If someone asks you for the weapons, just grab them and give it to them, unless it's some super shady motherfucker it's for the greater good, otherwise it's entirely up to you who you give the weapons to.

You might want to wait before some of them start contacting you. In case you lose the case I'll let someone stash it in the container again.
